description: Narachan is experiencing a water crisis.

messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?

Thank you, Narachan! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under?
Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?

Sorry to hear that, Narachan. I understand that having a water crisis can be a big issue. Can you please describe what exactly is happening with your water supply issue? Is it that you're not getting any water, or is the water dirty or contaminated in some way?
Based on your complaint about a water crisis, I would say that your issue falls under the Water Supply category.
